subject: Jakarta changes in slice-analysis-ms for IBN Cloud leased line update and CCVPN closed-loop. This commit contains work in sub-task: 1) AAI monitor thread; 2) bandwidth evaluator; 3) policy notification code.
commit_message:
Jakarta changes in slice-analysis-ms for IBN Cloud leased line update and CCVPN closed-loop. This commit contains work in sub-task: 1) AAI monitor thread; 2) bandwidth evaluator; 3) policy notification code.

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-3063
Signed-off-by: decheng zhang <decheng.zhang@huawei.com>
Change-Id: I9029ffd7563e65be59f7fd76adc2a749ff624172
Signed-off-by: decheng zhang <decheng.zhang@huawei.com>

Patch Set 6:

This commit contains our work for CCVPN closed-loop. As we discussed before, I implemented this over slice-analysis-ms project. Please feel free to review and comment. Really appreciate your time. :)

Patch Set 7:

> Patch Set 6: Code-Review-1
> 
> (1 comment)
> 
> check your IDE settings. 
> * Several files are missing NL at their ends.
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/main/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/models/policy/Sla.java: no trailing NL
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/main/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/models/policy/TransportNetwork.java: no trailing NL
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/test/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/models/ccvpnnotification/CCVPNPmDatastoreTest.java: no trailing NL
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/test/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/service/BandwidthEvaluatorTest.java: no trailing NL
> 
> * Several java files are using tab indentations. (First lines with a tab are listed here.)
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/main/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/aai/AaiInterface.java:37:	public Map<String, Integer> fetchMaxBandwidthofService(String serviceId);
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/main/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/dmaap/DmaapClient.java:132:		// create notification consumers for ML MS
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/main/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/models/Configuration.java:147:	public int getCCVPNNotiPollingInterval() { return ccvpnNotipollingInterval;}
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/main/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/models/policy/AdditionalProperties.java:35:	private String modifyAction;
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/main/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/models/policy/Payload.java:28:	private String name;
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/main/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/service/PolicyService.java:49:	private PolicyDmaapClient policyDmaapClient;
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/test/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/service/PolicyServiceTest.java:47:	ObjectMapper obj = new ObjectMapper();
> 
> * Several java files are using "import ....*", which is not allowed.
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/main/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/service/BandwidthEvaluator.java
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/test/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/models/ccvpnnotification/CCVPNPmDatastoreTest.java
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/test/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/service/BandwidthEvaluatorTest.java
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/main/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/service/BandwidthEvaluator.java:import org.onap.slice.analysis.ms.models.ccvpnnotification.*;
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/main/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/service/BandwidthEvaluator.java:import java.util.concurrent.*;
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/test/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/models/ccvpnnotification/CCVPNPmDatastoreTest.java:import static org.junit.Assert.*;
>     components/slice-analysis-ms/src/test/java/org/onap/slice/analysis/ms/service/BandwidthEvaluatorTest.java:import static org.junit.Assert.*;
> 
> 
> Check your copyrights. Several files are missing the 2022 for Huawei.

Hi Tony, 

Thanks for your review. Yes, my Intellij had some issue and churned on my project files. Still, I should not neglect these formatting issue and problems in the first place. Sorry about that. I have corrected them one by one. Please give it a look at your convenience.
